name: Cold Space
short_description: Fast team-based one-shot-one-kill shooter. Cold War gave a start for a huge conflict in space. Grab your knife and pistol, turn on your force-field and fight in the name of your motherland. But is it possible to survive for more than ten seconds in this slaughter?
detailed_description:
Note from develpers

Hello everyone, I am going to make this game free! (Waiting for the response from Steamsupport). To not run out of money for dedicated servers I have changed the network model to a listen host. Now you can host the game through the menu, and other people will find you. And because I never reached budget to deliver whole ColdpSace story, I am just adding last level called Heaven. If you want, I can tell you our original idea in our discord channel. Good luck, spacemen! PS You also can unlock all achievements in training mode, playing with bots ;)


About the Game

Fast deadly and really fun. Participate in a huge space conflict based on a Cold War with your teammates. Fair fights, where only your skill and speed does matter. - Every shot is a potential kill. - Fast respawn for unstoppable process. - Melee weapon makes you more deadly in a close combat. - Use the force-field, if you would like to life a little longer. - Watch radar to cover your back. - Use double jump mechanics to take advantage on a battlefield. - Grab pickups dropped on the level, to make yourself more dangerous: rapid-fire, wallhack, speedhack, quad-jump and improved force-field. - Customize your spaceman with a looted outfits. Earth's orbit, Mars and Venus could become your grave. Try to survive.
about_the_game:
Fast deadly and really fun. Participate in a huge space conflict based on a Cold War with your teammates.
Fair fights, where only your skill and speed does matter.

- Every shot is a potential kill.
- Fast respawn for unstoppable process.
- Melee weapon makes you more deadly in a close combat.
- Use the force-field, if you would like to life a little longer.
- Watch radar to cover your back.
- Use double jump mechanics to take advantage on a battlefield.
- Grab pickups dropped on the level, to make yourself more dangerous: rapid-fire, wallhack, speedhack, quad-jump and improved force-field.
- Customize your spaceman with a looted outfits.

Earth's orbit, Mars and Venus could become your grave. Try to survive.
